case_title: DENISE COOPER VS. SACRED DYING FOUNDATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,625.00 FILED BY COOPER, DENISE AS TO DEFENDANT SACRED DYING FOUNDATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: N/A) SERVED APR-18-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SACRED DYING FOUNDATION
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOPER, DENISE AS TO DEFENDANT SACRED DYING FOUNDATION
DECLARATION RE: ADDRESS UPDATE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOPER, DENISE
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-09-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-20-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT: SACRED DYING FOUNDATION; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,773.53 AS TO DEFENDANT SACRED DYING FOUNDATION
DECLARATION OF DENISE COOPER RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOPER, DENISE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUN-13-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LAURA HUTTO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SACRED DYING FOUNDATION IS NOT PRESENT. THIS CASE WAS HEARD WITH CSM 19-859969. THERE IS AN ISSUE OF PROOF OF SERVICE: PARTY SERVED IS NOT CONFIRMED WITH SECRETARY OF STATE WEBSITE. PARTIES STATE THAT AGENT OF SERVICE/CEO LISTED ON THE WEBSITE IS DECEASED AND REMAINING OFFICERS HAVE RESIGNED. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II REQUESTS THE PLAINTIFF'S SUPPLY THE COURT WITH PROOF THAT THE PARTY SERVED IS A REMAINING MEMBER OF THE BOARD OF SACRED DYING FOUNDATION. THE COURT CALLED THE EXECUTIVE OF THE ESTATE OF THE CEO AND LEFT A MESSAGE FOR A CALL BACK. THE PLAINTIFFS WAIVE ANY POSSIBLE CONFLICT OF INTEREST AND GIVE PERMISSION FOR JUDGE ROBERTSON II TO SPEAK WITH MEGAN LIPP. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF DENISE COOPER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SCARED DYING FOUNDATION IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOPER, DENISE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SACRED DYING FOUNDATION $1,625.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,690.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 6/17/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $14.82 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO PLAINTIFF COOPER, DENISE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOPER, DENISE AS TO DEFENDANT SACRED DYING FOUNDATION
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
INFORMATION REQUESTED AT COURT HEARING (MAY 9TH HEARING) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOPER, DENISE
